exemptions.packages/astropress/pages/ap-admin/404.a: Intentional error surface. Route coverage treats it as a non-200 page by design.
exemptions.packages/astropress/pages/ap-admin/fundr: Feature-gated by donations configuration. Covered structurally by route audits, not by default harness data.
exemptions.packages/astropress/pages/ap-admin/archi: Dynamic archive editor route. Covered by repository and route-registry tests rather than the default Playwright seed.
exemptions.packages/astropress/pages/ap-admin/impor: Import flows need source-specific fixtures and are covered by BDD and action tests instead of the default admin harness.
Import flows need source-specific fixtures and are covered by BDD and action tests instead of the default admin harness.
exemptions.packages/astropress/pages/ap-admin/posts: Revision history is exercised through content save and restore coverage, not a dedicated default-harness journey yet.
exemptions.packages/astropress/pages/ap-admin/previ: Preview route depends on runtime preview inputs and is validated through preview middleware and runtime tests.
exemptions.packages/astropress/pages/ap-admin/route: Dynamic route-page editor depends on seeded route-page data and is covered by route-registry and CRUD coverage instead.
exemptions.packages/astropress/pages/ap-admin/subsc: Subscriber surfaces depend on optional newsletter integrations and are covered outside the default harness.
Subscriber surfaces depend on optional newsletter integrations and are covered outside the default harness.
